_owner: TechBrot Inc. — Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor team
_methodology: One anonymized row per real lead, completed at engagement close (or marked lost). Captures the marketing-attribution chain — first-touch and last-touch source, the session landing page, the page viewed just before the inquiry, and the service requested — plus whether the lead became a paying client and, if so, the revenue band. The goal is to know which pages generate REVENUE, not just traffic. No client-identifying data is ever stored; revenue is recorded as a band, never an exact figure. Observed only — never estimated or modeled. The published page reports the live N and never reports a statistic on a breakdown until N>=20 (minimum) and prefers N>=50; sample size is always disclosed.

_schema.lead_id: string — anonymous opaque id, no client linkage
_schema.first_touch_source: string — how the lead first reached us: organic-search, ai-assistant, referral, social, direct, paid, other
_schema.last_touch_source: string — the source of the session in which they inquired (same enum)
_schema.ai_tool: string|null — if AI-assisted: chatgpt, claude, gemini, perplexity, copilot, other-ai, or null
_schema.landing_page: string — the first page of the converting session (path or page_type)
_schema.page_before_inquiry: string — the page viewed immediately before submitting (path or page_type)
_schema.service_requested: string — primary service requested (from the intake services[])
_schema.became_client: boolean — did the lead become a paying client
_schema.revenue_band: string|null — closed revenue band if became_client: <1500, 1500-5000, 5000-15000, 15000-50000, 50000+ (recurring annualized); null if not a client

_note: first/last-touch, landing_page, and page_before_inquiry are captured by the intake form's attribution trackers (hidden fields) once the form handler is live at flip; became_client and revenue_band are logged by the founder at engagement close. No fabrication; a blank field stays blank.
